summary: Allow a server-only CockroachDB/PostgreSQL connection pool helper for Next.js server code.
created_for: Set up a DATABASE_URL-backed pool/database connection library for server-side use only.

review_items.summary: Add next-diffforge/src/lib/server/db.js as the server-only database pool module.

value.summary: Creates and exports a DATABASE_URL-backed pg Pool for server-side CockroachDB/PostgreSQL access.
responsibilities: Read DATABASE_URL only from the server process environment.
Create one shared pg Pool instance per server runtime.
Export small helpers for server-side callers to get the pool, run parameterized queries, and close the pool.
invariants: This module must not be imported by browser/client components or client-side utilities.
Database reads and writes that expose sensitive data must perform authorization in the server route or server action that calls this module.
DATABASE_URL must not be exposed through NEXT_PUBLIC variables or client bundles.

review_items.summary: Server database access must remain isolated from client-side code.

value.summary: DATABASE_URL-backed database access is available only to server-side Next.js code.
invariants: Do not import the database pool module from React components that can run in the browser.
Do not expose DATABASE_URL or derived connection details through API responses, props, logs intended for users, or NEXT_PUBLIC environment variables.
Every future route or server action that uses the pool for protected data must enforce authorization at that boundary.

cross_project_impact.compatibility_notes: No existing cross-project contract consumes this helper.
